translations.en: Ybarra
translations.note: NPC name，迷失在地道中的前水手

translations.en: a sunken-faced, starving man, dressed in rags.
translations.zh: 一個臉頰凹陷、衣衫襤褸、飢餓不堪的男人。

translations.en: "Thou art back!"
"Please, please! @Give me some food!"
translations.zh: 「求求你，求求你！@Give給我一點食物！」

translations.en: It takes a few moments for the man to notice you.
translations.zh: 那男人過了片刻才注意到你。

translations.en: "Hu--humans!"
"Please, you must help me!" he says weakly.
translations.zh: 「求求你，你一定要幫我！」他有氣無力地說。

translations.en: "I need @food, badly!"
"Ybarra. Ybarra's my name."
"Lost here, no job now."
translations.zh: 「迷失在這裡，現在沒有工作了。」

translations.en: "I used to sail under Captain Hawkins on the Empire."
translations.zh: 「我以前在帝國號上，在霍金斯船長手下航行。」

translations.en: "We had @food then!"
"But those days are gone...."
"Yes, @food! The last thing I ate was my @belt."
translations.zh: 「是的，@food食物！我吃的最後一樣東西是我的@belt腰帶。」

translations.en: "And that was three weeks ago."
"If only you could @give me some food..."
translations.zh: 「要是你能@give給我一點食物就好了……」

translations.en: "Not very tasty, but it was filling."
translations.zh: 「味道不怎麼樣，但還是填飽了肚子。」

translations.en: "Map? Map. Map."
"You already got it from me."
"Oh, the map. Yes, I still have that."
"I couldn't eat it."
"It ought to be worth some @food, surely?"
"Leave here? No!"
"I've almost gotten the tunnels figured out!"
translations.zh: 「我快要弄清楚這些地道的走法了！」

translations.en: "Just a few more days and I'll be free!"
"But I must have @food!"
"Don't go! I need @food... @food..."
"Huh?"
You share
$Y shares
some food with the pathetic man.
translations.zh: 一些食物給這個可憐的男人。

translations.en: "Thunff fou," Ybarra says, stuffing the food into his mouth.
translations.zh: 「謝、謝你，」伊芭拉一邊說，一邊把食物塞進嘴裡。
translations.note: 嘴裡塞滿食物的含糊說法

translations.en: After finishing the offered meal, however, Ybarra still seemes starved.
translations.zh: 然而吃完奉上的食物後，伊芭拉看起來依然飢餓。

translations.en: Suddenly, you realize that you have no food to give him!
translations.zh: 你突然意識到，你根本沒有食物可以給他！

translations.en: "No @food?" he asks. "Then thou art doomed too!"
translations.zh: 「沒有@food食物？」他問道。「那你也完了！」

translations.en: He hands you the map piece and rubs his hands, eagerly awaiting his food.
translations.zh: 他把地圖碎片遞給你，搓了搓手，迫不及待地等著食物。

translations.en: "You must! I'll die! Just a little bit of @food for the map?"
translations.zh: 「你必須給！我要死了！就換那麼一點點@food食物行嗎？」

translations.en: His last shred of hope torn away from him, the withered man leaps at you, screaming "@Food! @Food!"
translations.zh: 最後一絲希望破滅，這個憔悴的男人撲向你，大喊「@Food食物！@Food食物！」

translations.en: "Can I have a little before you go?"
The man collapses, the last of his energy gone.
translations.zh: 那男人癱倒在地，最後的一點力氣也耗盡了。

translator_notes: 伊芭拉是迷失在海盜巢穴地道中的前帝國號水手，處於極度飢餓狀態——連腰帶都吃了。地圖碎片是重要道具（可換食物）。「Thunff fou」為嘴裡塞滿食物的「Thank you」，翻譯為含糊的「謝、謝你」以保留喜劇感。崩潰攻擊場景情緒轉折鮮明。
